reviews.comment:
Vengo desde hace 15 años acá y fui socio del Aca hasta hace un año.
Cargo nafta y cuando voy a arrancar me quedo sin batería. Me pidieron q saque el auto porque molestaba y nadie del Aca se dignó en darme arranque teniendo todos los mecánicos en piso d arriba. Lamentable servicio.

(Translated by Google)
I've been coming here for 15 years and was a member of the ACA until a year ago. I fill up with gas and when I go to start the car, the battery dies. They asked me to move the car because it was blocking traffic, and no one from the ACA bothered to jump-start it, even though all the mechanics are upstairs. Terrible service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNktLZUF3EAE
